title: Astral Sorcery Anti Anti Fake Player (ASAAFP)
description: This mod makes it so fake players (such as the user from cyclic or player simulator from integrated dynamics) can use Astral Sorcery machines (such as the grindstone)
body:
# Astral Sorcery Anti Anti Fake Player
[https://github.com/ton185/astralsorceryantiantifakeplayer](https://github.com/ton185/astralsorceryantiantifakeplayer)
## What?
This mod makes it so fake players (such as the user from cyclic or player simulator from integrated dynamics) can use Astral Sorcery machines (such as the grindstone)

## How?
It's very simple, the developer of Astral Sorcery specifically made a check to block fake players from interacting with his machines, so this mod just removes that check.

**If you want me to port this mod to another version then make an issue.**
